EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} changed the group "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} added the group "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} added the device "{object.name}" to the group "{object.group}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} removed the device "{object.name}" from the group "{object.group}" on host {event_src.host}
